rationale: Educ. Code §26.0081 governs parental notification regarding special education and learning difficulty services. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 26.0081. RIGHT TO INFORMATION CONCERNING SPECIAL EDUCATION AND EDUCATION OF STUDENTS WITH LEARNING DIFFICULTIES.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns special education parent notifications; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
